title: com.para.civic.defs
summary: Indexed civic views for cabildeos, positions, option summaries, vote totals, outcomes, and viewer context.
relationships: Backs com.para.civic.getCabildeo and list-style civic queries.
Includes viewerContext for direct and delegated vote state.
constraints: `cabildeoView` requires title, description, community, options, phase, createdAt, optionSummary, positionCounts, and voteTotals.
`positionView` requires cabildeo linkage, stance, text, and createdAt.
lifecycle: Records such as cabildeo, position, vote, and delegation are indexed into civic view objects.
Clients primarily consume the indexed view layer rather than stitching raw civic records together.
writers: Backend indexing pipeline writes view materializations from civic records.
readers: Cabildeo detail, cabildeo list, delegation UX, and community civic overlays.
indexing: Aggregates options, votes, positions, and viewer context into cabildeoView.
Computes outcome and option summaries from indexed participation state.
moderation: Community scope and viewer context shape which civic activity is shown to a user.

fields.name: cabildeoView
fields.description: Full indexed view of a civic deliberation including phase, options, summaries, vote totals, and viewer context.

fields.name: positionView
fields.description: Indexed view of a user position tied to a cabildeo, including stance and text.

fields.name: viewerContext
fields.description: Per-viewer civic state such as current vote, delegation target, and grace-period metadata.
